summary: All round-1 findings addressed correctly. T3-M1 (hard-blocker ordering) and T3-M2 (gas-unavailable sentinel) are fixed. T3-L1 (note text disambiguation) and T3-L3 (sanity-band comment) are fixed. T3-L2 was correctly left unchanged. Two additional security-review fixes landed in this commit (resolveRpcUrl validation, scrubUrls/errMessage helpers) — both are positive additions that strengthen the spike without affecting test correctness. No new issues found.

taskRequired.reason: All findings resolved. Script passes all acceptance criteria from task spec. No critical, high, or medium issues remain.

round1FindingsResolution.verificationNote: Hard-blocker checks (supportsEip3009===false, decimals!==6) now at lines 345-358, BEFORE gas computation (line 360+), artifact write (line 425), and stdout emission (line 418). A failed spike exits 1 without writing the artifact. Ordering is correct.

GAS_COST_UNAVAILABLE = 'unavailable (gas pricing skipped)' introduced at line 310. When readGasPriceWei returns null, sampleGasCost is set to this sentinel (line 376). No longer ambiguous with a real zero-cost measurement. Artifact currently shows '1260 micro-USDC' from the live run — sentinel path untested in smoke but the code path is clearly correct.

Both ambiguous-probe note texts now read 'probe inconclusive (treating as absent to avoid false positive) — <message>' (lines 220, 267). Clearly distinguishable from the 'gas estimation fallback applied' note and from the 'existence inferred from revert' note.
Correctly left unchanged per round-1 assessment. Selector exit fires before artifact write — no issue.
Sanity-band comment at lines 385-391 now spells out what wildlyLow (off-by-12-orders ceil-divide collapse) and wildlyHigh (inverted conversion) actually catch. Comment is clear and auditable.

newAdditionAssessment.description: resolveRpcUrl() helper (lines 89-100): validates ARC_RPC_URL is http(s) before use; exits 1 on non-URL value without echoing the raw value (avoids API-key leak). This is a security-review fix.
newAdditionAssessment.verdict: correct and appropriate — strengthens operator UX and protects against credential leak via env var validation

newAdditionAssessment.description: scrubUrls() + errMessage() helpers (lines 123-131): strips http(s) URLs from error messages before they land in notes[], stderr, or the artifact. This is a security-review fix.
newAdditionAssessment.verdict: correct and appropriate — prevents authenticated RPC URLs from being committed to the artifact. The replacement is '<rpc-url>' which preserves diagnostic structure.

acceptanceCriteriaChecked.criterion: Script exists, TypeScript-typed, runs under tsx
Uses viem only, no hre.ethers, no Hardhat imports
Reads name(), version(), decimals() from USDC on Arc Testnet
Selector self-check toFunctionSelector(...) === 0xe3ee160e
Proves authorizationState and transferWithAuthorization exist
Estimates gas and converts to USDC cost
Stdout JSON shape correct, notes key omitted when empty
Exit non-zero if supportsEip3009 === false or decimals !== 6
acceptanceCriteriaChecked.note: Now fires BEFORE artifact write and stdout — correctly ordered.

acceptanceCriteriaChecked.criterion: Prints warning (exit 0) if gasCostExceedsThreshold === true
arc-testnet-usdc-domain.json written with matching shape
dual-decimal notes entry emitted when conversion performed
Gas fallback path emits notes entry
Script header documents consumer contract (T6 reads notes at module load)
Spike outcomes recorded in decisions.md
acceptanceCriteriaChecked.note: Confirmed by teammate: written in commit 46600be.

acceptanceCriteriaChecked.criterion: No secrets / private keys leaked to stdout even on error path
RPC retry up to 3 times with backoff
gasPrice unavailable → notes entry + sentinel sampleGasCost
Stdout/artifact JSON shape byte-identical in field set
Sanity-check band applied to dual-decimal result
Hard blockers fire before artifact write

recommendation: All acceptance criteria met. Spike is ready to gate Wave 3. The gasCostExceedsThreshold=true result (1260 micro-USDC vs 500 threshold) requires decisions.md entry per task spec post-completion checklist — confirmed written. T6 will surface the notes[] entries at module load. No further review rounds needed.
